rules_followed: did not modify Visual Signature semantics
goal: Prepare Brand3 for GitHub/team review as one coherent repository while preserving Initial Scoring and Visual Signature as separate layers.

keep_tracked: selected examples/visual_signature fixtures/manifests/governance/calibration/corpus artifacts needed for tests and review
conditional_ignores_after_artifact_polic: generated static platform bundles if rebuildable

generated_artifacts_policy.default_rule: Commit curated source fixtures, manifests, governance records, calibration records, and small deterministic test artifacts; do not commit local runtime outputs by default.
commit: small deterministic fixtures used by tests
governance JSON/MD artifacts that define policy
calibration summaries and small sample records needed for review
do_not_commit_by_default: generated static bundles that can be reproduced
use_lfs_or_external_bundle_for: artifact packs over normal source-review size
pr_questions: Is this source fixture, audit export, or local output?
Is it small enough for normal Git?

screenshots: Keep only minimal curated screenshot samples in Git when tests or docs need them.
Put full screenshot sets in Git LFS or external artifact storage.
Do not commit screenshots from private client work without explicit approval.
Preserve raw vs clean/full-page semantics in artifact names and manifests.
caches: Never commit .pytest_cache, __pycache__, local browser caches, provider caches, or temporary generated files.
Treat LLM cache rows in SQLite as local runtime state unless a synthetic fixture is explicitly created.
Treat Graphify cache/cost/manifest files as local cache.

rules: Never paste real provider keys into docs, examples, logs, tests, or screenshots.
Keep team/deploy secrets in GitHub Actions secrets or deployment platform secrets.
Use dummy test tokens only in tests.
Prompt changes must identify the affected layer.
Prompt changes must not be bundled with rubric changes unless explicitly stated.
Prompt changes that affect cached provider calls must bump or introduce a prompt version.
Long prompts should have stable IDs and version strings.
PRs should include snapshot/test evidence or written rationale when behavior changes.
recommended_versions: Keep brand3-llm-v1 until semantic llm_analyzer prompt changes.
Add explicit versions for report narrative prompts.
Add explicit version for visual_analyzer vision prompt.
Keep visual-signature-annotation-prompt-1 until Visual Signature annotation semantics change.

guardrails: No scoring logic change unless explicitly intended
No rubric dimension change unless explicitly intended
No Visual Signature to scoring integration unless explicitly intended
No provider execution added to read-only platform views
No runtime mutation added to review/navigation surfaces
artifacts: New artifacts are source fixtures, not local outputs
Large files are avoided, externalized, or intentionally handled through LFS
Generated artifacts include regeneration command or rationale
prompts: Prompt version updated if semantics/cache behavior changed
Prompt behavior has tests, snapshots, or written rationale
validation: README/docs updated if commands or workflows changed

run_locally: Add provider keys only if running provider-backed scoring/capture.
review_prompts: Check which file and prompt ID changed.
Identify affected layer: scoring extraction, report narrative, vision, or Visual Signature annotation.
Check whether prompt version/cache key changed when needed.
inspect_scoring_outputs: Review SQLite scores and output JSON dimensions.
Remember rich report prose is render-time derived.
inspect_visual_signature_outputs: Review screenshots/capture manifests according to artifact policy.
Remember Visual Signature is evidence-only and does not mutate scoring.

staged_implementation_plan.name: safety cleanup
staged_implementation_plan.objective: Prevent accidental publication of local data, secrets, and generated outputs.
actions: Inspect git status --short.
Separate intended source/test/docs changes from local generated artifacts.
Confirm .env, data, output, logs, validation folders, caches, and local tool configs are not staged.
Run targeted secret scan excluding local ignored paths.
Decide how to handle untracked Visual Signature source/tests versus generated artifacts.
done_when: No local secret/runtime/generated data is selected for commit.
The team can see which files are source and which are generated.

staged_implementation_plan.name: docs
staged_implementation_plan.objective: Make the project understandable to a teammate without repo archaeology.
actions: Update README.md.
Add CONTRIBUTING.md.
Add docs/environment.md.
Add docs/artifact_policy.md.
Add docs/prompts.md.
Add docs/architecture.md.
Add docs/local_review.md.
done_when: A teammate can set up, run, test, inspect scoring, inspect Visual Signature, and understand guardrails from docs.

staged_implementation_plan.name: gitignore
staged_implementation_plan.objective: Encode artifact and cache policy into repository hygiene.
actions: Add .sentrux/.
Add .pytest_cache/.
Add *.sqlite3-shm and *.sqlite3-wal.
Add generated Visual Signature screenshot/corpus paths after artifact policy decision.
Keep .env, .env.local, data, output, logs, and validation batches ignored.
done_when: New local runs do not create tempting untracked generated clutter.

staged_implementation_plan.name: platform navigation
staged_implementation_plan.objective: Keep the unified local review flow easy to access.
actions: Preserve / and /analyze scoring flow.
Keep /visual-signature read-only.
Document routes in README and docs/local_review.md.
Add or verify tests for navigation if route labels change.
done_when: A teammate can run the app and review both Initial Scoring and Visual Signature from the browser.

staged_implementation_plan.name: prompt workflow
staged_implementation_plan.objective: Make prompt evolution reviewable and reproducible.
actions: Document current prompt inventory.
Add explicit prompt IDs/versions where missing in future prompt PRs.
Define when prompt version bumps are required.
Define expected tests/snapshots/rationale for prompt changes.
Keep prompt PRs separate from rubric/scoring changes by default.
done_when: Reviewers can tell whether a prompt change affects scoring, report prose, cache keys, or Visual Signature annotation semantics.

staged_implementation_plan.name: team review process
actions: Use the PR checklist.
Require relevant test commands in PR descriptions.
Require artifact classification for new files.
Require docs updates when commands, env vars, routes, prompts, or artifact policy changes.
Use small PRs: hygiene/docs, Visual Signature source, fixture policy, prompt workflow, platform navigation.
done_when: The repo can be published with clear review norms and without accidentally merging private/generated state.

publication_readiness_gate: .gitignore covers local caches and generated outputs
Large generated artifacts are excluded, LFS-managed, or explicitly approved
Full or relevant test suite passes
Visual Signature separation from scoring is documented
No .env, local DB, output, logs, validation folders, or caches are staged
